TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_The_Amazing_Criswell, title = The_Amazing_Criswell, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Amazing_Criswell} }

S.FORM: The Amazing Criswell kawas tay 1907, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 8, The Amazing Criswell, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1982) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
The Amazing Criswell kawas tay 1907, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 8, The Amazing Criswell, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1982) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: tħe amaziŋ ʦ~ʨris~ɕwell kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, tħe amaziŋ ʦ~ʨris~ɕwell, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
